hero.title: Business Hinglish mein...<0/>toh invoicing English mein kyun?
hero.subtitle: Ab Hinglish mein banayein,<3/><0>perfect English invoices</0>. Khaas creators ke liye.

card.voucherBody: Hamari taraf se aaj tak ki angrezi confusion ka refund — aapka Ulta Bill 🧾 ↩️. Pehle 5 signups ko, roz. <1><0>T&Cs</0> apply</1>
card.disclaimer: By tapping Send OTP, you agree to create an account and Sparkonomy's <0>Terms</0> and <1>Privacy Policy</1>.

threeStep.title: 3 simple steps. Bas itna.
threeStep.subtitle: Itna easy ki pehli baar mein hi ho jayega.

items.title: Bolo, type, ya screenshot
items.description: WhatsApp message, email, brand chat ka screenshot upload karein — ya bas bolein/ likhein "invoice banao."

items.title: AI invoice banayega
items.description: AI proper format mein invoice banata hai, typo-free. GST/ PAN apne aap add. Aap check kar sakte ho, edit kar sakte ho.

items.title: Follow-ups hum karenge
items.description: "Hi, payment?" bhejne ki zarurat nahi. Sparkonomy ka AI WhatsApp aur email pe polite, professional reminders bhejta hai.

testimonials.title: Creators kya bol rahe hain
testimonials.subtitle: Payments jaldi, aur aap bhi Pro lagein.

items.quote: And I have to reach out so many times to get paid in 3 months, and still it hasn't happened 15-20 times! I want you to do my payment reminders
items.name: Food YouTuber

items.quote: I raise invoices once a month mostly. I don't get time… and it delays my payments. I want you help me raise instant invoices in under 5 mins from my phone
items.name: Tech Instagrammer

items.quote: I don't have time to write down and track all payments in Excel and become my own accountant! I want you to track & remind me of my money matters
items.name: Lifestyle Instagrammer

advantage.title: Aur kya milta hai?
advantage.subtitle: Beta period ke saare features — completely free.

items.title: Proof of Work, automatic.
items.description: Insta, YouTube ke screenshots khud attach ho jayenge. Aapko nahi karna padega.

items.title: Hamesha free, 4 invoices.
items.description: Har mahine 4 invoices free — koi card nahi, koi hidden charge nahi.

items.title: Tax calculations, AI karta hai.
items.description: GST ho ya na ho, AI sab calculate kar leta hai. TDS, barter, multi-rate — sab handle.

items.title: CA-ready, year-end report.
items.description: Saara data ek click pe export. CA ko bheje, ITR file karein — ab Excel ka jhanjat band.

items.question: How do I sign up?
items.answer: Give your phone number - that is it! After that, share your social handles, answer a couple of easy questions on your billing info, and you'll be sending invoices using Sparkonomy's AI quicker than a collab DM reply!

items.question: How is this AI for creators and its smart payment useful for me?
items.answer: Sparkonomy ka AI creators ko apna business ek pro tarah manage karne mein help karta hai. Chat ya collab details share karein aur GST-ready invoice ready ho jaayega.

items.question: What information do I need to add to my profile to start invoicing
items.answer: Apna naam, address, PAN, aur payment details (UPI ya bank account) add karein. 5 minutes se kam time lagta hai aur sirf ek baar karna hota hai.

items.question: How do I create my first invoice?
items.answer: Creator AI aapko phone par sirf kuch taps mein, 3 minutes se bhi kam time mein invoice bana deta hai.

items.question: How will Sparkonomy make payment reminders on my behalf?
items.answer: Invoice banate time aap choose karte hain ki reminders kitne bhejne hain, kitni frequency par, aur WhatsApp/email par bhejne hain ya nahi.

floatingCta.heading: <0>₹</0>500 jaa raha hai — aaj ke pehle 5 ko.
floatingCta.modalTitle: Apni boli mein invoice bhejna shuru karein

referral.message: ka maan na hai ki yeh app creators ke liye sabse easy hai — aap bhi ise try karke dekho.

otp.title: 4-digit OTP daalein
otp.errorInvalid: Galat OTP. Phir se try karein.
otp.errorNetwork: Kuch gadbad ho gayi. Phir se try karein.

signupCard.otpSentOverWhatsapp: OTP WhatsApp par bheja gaya hai
